compiled_state.title: dso:complexity-evaluator named agent not found by Agent tool despite plugin being installed
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: When sprint orchestrator dispatches subagent_type: dso:complexity-evaluator via the Agent tool, it fails with 'Agent type dso:complexity-evaluator not found. Available agents: general-purpose, statusline-setup, Explore, Plan, claude-code-guide'. The named agent definition exists in plugins/dso/agents/ but the Claude Code Agent tool does not resolve it. This causes the sprint orchestrator to fall back to a general-purpose agent with inline prompt instead of the dedicated haiku-based evaluator.

comments.body: Classification: llm-behavioral — ticket references agent guidance/skill behavior gap. Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed.
comments.author: Test
